subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Salman II
subcodes.first_line: O Salmán! Follow thou in all things the example of the One true God, and be content with whatsoever He ordaineth.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلمان در هر امور اقتدا بحق کن و بقضایای الهی راضی باش ملاحظه کن که این
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
